summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tenuta Leone wedding venue website. Frontend-backend integration working excellently. Minor backend validation issue identified but core functionality operational.

validation_issues.issue: Contact form accepts empty required fields (name, email, message)
validation_issues.impact: Should validate and reject empty submissions but currently accepts them

design_issues.issue: Hero slider uses different CSS class names than expected in tests

passed_tests: Homepage loads with proper SEO meta tags and structured data
Navbar navigation with all menu items functional
Hero section displays correctly with navigation arrows
WhatsApp integration working with correct wa.me URL
Mobile responsiveness excellent with working hamburger menu
About, Services, and Footer sections present
Booking form fields interactive and responsive
All API endpoints responding correctly (200 status codes)
Page load performance within acceptable range
action_item_for_main_agent: Add server-side validation in /api/contact endpoint to reject submissions with empty required fields (name, email, message)
